entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A deficiency of essential micronutrients in the diet affecting populations in developing countries

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where micronutrient malnutrition is a significant issue

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where micronutrient malnutrition is a significant issue

entities.name: HIDDEN HUNGER
entities.description: A form of malnutrition resulting from a lack of micronutrients despite sufficient calorie intake

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTATION
entities.description: The practice of adding micronutrients to the diet via pills or liquids

entities.name: FOOD FORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of adding micronutrients to staple foods during processing

entities.name: NUTRITION SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for biofortification to combat malnutrition

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for biofortification to combat malnutrition

entities.name: VITAMIN A
entities.description: An essential micronutrient targeted for biofortification to combat malnutrition

entities.name: GENETIC BIO-FORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of improving the nutritional quality of food crops through genetic means

entities.name: TRADITIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Conventional methods of crop improvement through crossing and selection

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: The diversity in gene frequencies within a population, necessary for traditional breeding

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION
entities.description: The process by which information from a gene is used in the synthesis of a functional gene product

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process of building up micronutrients within a plant tissue

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The direct manipulation of an organism's genes using biotechnology to improve traits

entities.name: GENE TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The application of genetic engineering techniques to modify DNA

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Plants grown for food, targeted for biofortification to increase nutrient density
